title: Responses, Problem Details, Streaming, and Protocol-Aware Output · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs responses, problem details, streaming, and protocol-aware output from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the single-commit response and streaming contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for single-commit response and streaming contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict implicit 200, content sniffing, automatic length, one final status, informational responses, and header commitment order.
Serialize RFC 9457 problem type, title, status, detail, instance, extensions, and application/problem+json without leaking implementation data.
Map validation, authentication, authorization, absence, conflict, precondition, limit, timeout, cancellation, dependency, and internal failures consistently.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
